zh.lifeSummary: 當Maud of Gloucester於大約1120年出生在英國格盧斯特斯爾布里斯托時，她的父親Robert FitzRoy Earl of Gloucester31歲，母親Mabel FitzRobert Countess of Gloucester31歲。她於1141年與Ranulf II de Gernon在英國格盧斯特斯爾結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。她去世於1189年7月29日在英國英格蘭爾切斯特享年70歲，埋葬在英國爾切斯特聖 維包也斯 邱奇。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Maud of Gloucester于大约1120年出生在英国格盧斯特斯爾布里斯托时，她的父亲Robert FitzRoy Earl of Gloucester31岁，母亲Mabel FitzRobert Countess of Gloucester31岁。她于1141年与Ranulf II de Gernon在英国格盧斯特斯爾结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。她去世于1189年7月29日在英国英格兰爾切斯特享年70岁，埋葬在英国爾切斯特聖 維包也斯 邱奇。

nameMeanings.name: of
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese: Cheng, Jing, Kam Fung, Wai Shing, Wing, Yali, Yuk.
variant Romanization of the surnames 歐 and 區, see   Ou   1 and 2.

variants.name: Ou
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese Wei, Ying, Ching, Heng, Hong, Jia, Kuang Yu, Li-Ching, Cho, Chong, Chung, Sa.  Southeast Asian Lichun, Ming, Quan, Roeun, Sokhom, Chau, Hai, Leang, Ly, Nhanh, Phan, Pho, Tha.

Chinese: Mandarin form of the surname 歐, meaning ‘to sing someone's praise’ in ancient Chinese: (i) from the placename Dong Ou (東甌), a fief (in present-day Wenzhou in Zhejiang province) which was granted to Yao in 192  BC . It is said that Yao was a descendant of Wujiang (reigned 355–333  BC ), king of the state of Yue (located mainly in present-day Zhejiang and Jiangxi provinces) during the Spring and Autumn period (770–476  BC ). (ii) from the placename Ou Yu (歐餘), the name of a fief (located in present-day Zhejiang province) that was granted to Ti, the second son of Wujiang (reigned 355–333  BC ), king of the state of Yue (located mainly in present-day Zhejiang and Jiangxi provinces) during the Spring and Autumn period (770–476  BC ).

Chinese: Mandarin form of the surname 區, originally denoting an ancient vessel for measurement in ancient Chinese: from the personal name of Ou Zhizi (歐治子), an expert sword-maker who lived during the Spring and Autumn period (770–476 BC ). Some of his descendants inherited Ou (歐) as their surname, simplifying the Chinese character 歐 to 區.

nameMeanings.name: Maud
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Medieval vernacular form of Matilda . This form was characteristically Low German (i.e. including medieval Dutch and Flemish). The wife of William the Conqueror , who bore this name, was the daughter of Baldwin , Count of Flanders. In Flemish and Dutch the letter -t- was generally lost when it occurred between vowels, giving forms such as Ma(h)auld. Maud or Matilda was also the name of the daughter ( 1102–67 ) of Henry I of England; she was married early in life to the Holy Roman Emperor Henry V , and later disputed the throne of England with her cousin Stephen . In 1128 she married Geoffrey , Count of Anjou. A medieval chronicler commented, ‘she was a good woman, but she had little bliss with him’. The name Maud became quite common in England in the 19th century, when its popularity was influenced in part by Tennyson's poem Maud, published in 1855 , but has not been much used since the early decades of the 20th century.

en.lifeSummary: When Maud of Gloucester was born about 1120, in Bristol, Gloucestershire, England, her father, Robert FitzRoy Earl of Gloucester, was 31 and her mother, Mabel FitzRobert Countess of Gloucester, was 31. She married Ranulf II de Gernon in 1141, in Gloucestershire, England. They were the parents of at least 1 son. She died on 29 July 1189, in Chester, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 70, and was buried in St Werburgh's Church, Chester, Cheshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Maud of Gloucester est née environ 1120, à Bristol, Gloucestershire, Angleterre, son père, Robert FitzRoy Earl of Gloucester, avait 31 ans et sa mère, Mabel FitzRobert Countess of Gloucester, avait 31 ans. Elle a épousé Ranulf II de Gernon en 1141, à Gloucestershire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Elle est décédée le 29 juillet 1189, à Chester, Cheshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 70 ans, et a été enterrée à St Werburgh's Church, Chester, Cheshire, Angleterre.

Sie hat 1141 in Gloucestershire, England Ranulf II de Gernon geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn. Sie starb am 29. Juli 1189 im Alter von 70 Jahren in Chester, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom und wurde in St Werburgh's Church, Chester, Cheshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Maud of Gloucester è nata il circa 1120 nel Bristol, Gloucestershire, England, sua padre, Robert FitzRoy Earl of Gloucester, aveva 31 anni e sua madre, Mabel FitzRobert Countess of Gloucester, aveva 31 anni. Lei sposato Ranulf II de Gernon nel 1141, nel Gloucestershire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio. ja.lifeSummary: Maud of Gloucesterが約1120年にイギリスグロウセステルシュアイアブリストルで生まれた時，父Robert FitzRoy Earl of Gloucesterは31歳，母Mabel FitzRobert Countess of Gloucesterは31歳であった。1141年にイギリスグロウセステルシュアイアでRanulf II de Gernonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。彼女は1189年7月29日にイギリスイギリスチェシュアイアチェスターで70歳で死去し，イギリスチェシュアイアチェスタースト ウエルブルグh'ス チャーチにて埋葬された。

ko.St Werburgh's Church, Chester, Cheshire,: 영국 체실르 체스터 스트 워버그h'스 처르치
ko.lifeSummary: Maud of Gloucester(이)가 대략 1120년 영국 그루스스터실르 브리스톨에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Robert FitzRoy Earl of Gloucester(은)는 31세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Mabel FitzRobert Countess of Gloucester(은)는 31세였다. 그녀는 1141년 영국 그루스스터실르에서 Ranulf II de Gernon(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1189년 7월 29일 영국 잉글랜드 체실르 체스터에서 70세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 체실르 체스터 스트 워버그h'스 처르치에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Maud of Gloucester nasceu aproximadamente 1120, em Bristol, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Robert FitzRoy Earl of Gloucester, tinha 31 anos e sua mãe, Mabel FitzRobert Countess of Gloucester, tinha 31 anos. Ela casou-se com Ranulf II de Gernon em 1141, em Gloucestershire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho. ru.St Werburgh's Church, Chester, Cheshire,: ст вирбург'с чурч, честир, чешир, Англия
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Maud of Gloucester родилась около 1120 г. в местности бристол, глоусестиршир, Англия, её отцу по имени Robert FitzRoy Earl of Gloucester было 31 год, а матери, которую звали Mabel FitzRobert Countess of Gloucester, 31. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Ranulf II de Gernon в 1141 г. в местности глоусестиршир, Англия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Она умерла 29 июля 1189 г. в местности честир, чешир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 70 лет и была похоронена в местности ст вирбург'с чурч, честир, чешир, Англия.
